MLV_SPARK_SESSION_ACQUISITION_FAILED.title: Spark Session Acquisition Failed
MLV_SPARK_SESSION_ACQUISITION_FAILED.description: Failed to acquire a Spark session for the materialized view refresh. The Spark pool may be at capacity or unavailable.
MLV_SPARK_SESSION_ACQUISITION_FAILED.suggestedFix: Check Spark pool availability and capacity limits. Verify the workspace has sufficient CU allocation.

MLV_SPARK_SESSION_TIMEOUT.title: Spark Session Timeout
MLV_SPARK_SESSION_TIMEOUT.description: Timed out waiting for a Spark session to become available within the configured deadline.
MLV_SPARK_SESSION_TIMEOUT.suggestedFix: Increase the session acquisition timeout or check Spark pool scaling settings. Consider reducing concurrent workloads.

MLV_SCHEMA_MISMATCH.title: Schema Mismatch
MLV_SCHEMA_MISMATCH.description: Source table schema does not match the materialized view definition. Column types or names have changed since the view was created.
MLV_SCHEMA_MISMATCH.suggestedFix: Compare the source table schema with the view definition. Alter the view or source table to resolve mismatches.

MLV_SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_UNSUPPORTED.title: Schema Evolution Unsupported
MLV_SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_UNSUPPORTED.description: The detected schema change is not supported for incremental refresh. A full refresh may be required.
MLV_SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_UNSUPPORTED.suggestedFix: Drop and recreate the materialized view with the updated schema, or trigger a full refresh.

MLV_DELTA_READ_FAILED.title: Delta Read Failed
MLV_DELTA_READ_FAILED.description: Failed to read Delta Lake table data. The table may be corrupted, missing checkpoint files, or have incompatible protocol versions.
MLV_DELTA_READ_FAILED.suggestedFix: Verify the Delta table integrity with DESCRIBE HISTORY. Check for missing checkpoint files and run OPTIMIZE if needed.

MLV_QUERY_COMPILATION_FAILED.title: Query Compilation Failed
MLV_QUERY_COMPILATION_FAILED.description: The materialized view query failed to compile against the current source schema. This typically indicates a breaking schema change.
MLV_QUERY_COMPILATION_FAILED.suggestedFix: Review the view query for references to dropped or renamed columns. Update the view definition to match current schema.

MLV_PARTITION_PRUNING_FAILED.title: Partition Pruning Failed
MLV_PARTITION_PRUNING_FAILED.description: Could not apply partition pruning to the incremental refresh query. All partitions will be scanned, resulting in degraded performance.
MLV_PARTITION_PRUNING_FAILED.suggestedFix: Verify that the partition columns are referenced in the view's WHERE clause. Check partition metadata consistency.

MLV_CHECKPOINT_WRITE_FAILED.title: Checkpoint Write Failed
MLV_CHECKPOINT_WRITE_FAILED.description: Failed to write a refresh checkpoint after successful data processing. The refresh completed but recovery metadata was not persisted.
MLV_CHECKPOINT_WRITE_FAILED.suggestedFix: Check OneLake storage availability and permissions. The next refresh will re-process data from the last valid checkpoint.

FLT_PIPELINE_TIMEOUT.title: Pipeline Timeout
FLT_PIPELINE_TIMEOUT.description: The FLT pipeline execution exceeded the maximum allowed duration and was terminated.
FLT_PIPELINE_TIMEOUT.suggestedFix: Check for long-running Spark jobs or resource contention. Consider increasing the pipeline timeout or optimizing the query.

FLT_PIPELINE_CANCELLED.title: Pipeline Cancelled
FLT_PIPELINE_CANCELLED.description: The pipeline execution was cancelled by a user action or a system-initiated cancellation (e.g., capacity reclaim).
FLT_PIPELINE_CANCELLED.suggestedFix: If user-initiated, no action needed. If system-initiated, check capacity allocation and retry.

FLT_CONFIG_VALIDATION_FAILED.title: Configuration Validation Failed
FLT_CONFIG_VALIDATION_FAILED.description: The LiveTable configuration contains invalid or conflicting settings that prevent execution.
FLT_CONFIG_VALIDATION_FAILED.suggestedFix: Review the LiveTable JSON definition for syntax errors, missing required fields, or incompatible option combinations.

FLT_DAG_NODE_FAILED.title: DAG Node Failed
FLT_DAG_NODE_FAILED.description: A node in the DAG execution graph failed, causing downstream dependent nodes to be skipped.
FLT_DAG_NODE_FAILED.suggestedFix: Inspect the failed node's logs for the root cause error. Fix the underlying issue and re-run the pipeline.

FLT_DAG_FAULTED_NODES.title: DAG Faulted Nodes
FLT_DAG_FAULTED_NODES.description: One or more DAG nodes were marked as faulted and their dependent nodes were skipped during execution.
FLT_DAG_FAULTED_NODES.suggestedFix: Review the execution graph for the faulted node. Check upstream dependencies and fix the root cause before retrying.

FLT_ONELAKE_ACCESS_DENIED.title: OneLake Access Denied
FLT_ONELAKE_ACCESS_DENIED.description: The service principal or user identity does not have sufficient permissions to access the target OneLake path.
FLT_ONELAKE_ACCESS_DENIED.suggestedFix: Verify that the workspace identity has read/write access to the lakehouse. Check OneLake RBAC and sharing settings.

SPARK_POOL_EXHAUSTED.title: Spark Pool Exhausted
SPARK_POOL_EXHAUSTED.description: All Spark executors in the pool are in use. No capacity available to start a new session.
SPARK_POOL_EXHAUSTED.suggestedFix: Wait for existing jobs to complete, or scale up the Spark pool. Consider staggering refresh schedules to reduce peak load.

SPARK_JOB_ABORTED.title: Spark Job Aborted
SPARK_JOB_ABORTED.description: A Spark job was aborted due to executor failures, stage retries exhausted, or driver OOM.
SPARK_JOB_ABORTED.suggestedFix: Check Spark UI for executor logs and memory usage. Increase executor memory or reduce partition size if OOM.

SPARK_SHUFFLE_FETCH_FAILED.title: Spark Shuffle Fetch Failed
SPARK_SHUFFLE_FETCH_FAILED.description: A Spark shuffle stage failed because executors could not fetch shuffle blocks from remote nodes.
SPARK_SHUFFLE_FETCH_FAILED.suggestedFix: This is often transient. Retry the job. If persistent, check network connectivity between executors and disk space on shuffle service.
